calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: MOTION BY DEFENDANTS JAMSON WONG, DANIEL D. WONG, AND WAI SOO HO FOR ORDER DEEMING ADMITTED TRUTH OF FACTS AND MONETARY SANCTIONS

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendants Jamson Wong, Daniel D. Wong, and Wai Soo Ho's motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in their Requests for Admission, Set One, attached as Exhibit A to the Sanchez Declaration, is granted. Plaintiff Xiu Ying Zheng failed to respond to this discovery and is deemed to have admitted all matters specified in the RFAs. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2033.280, subds. (b), (c).) Sanctions are mandatory on this motion. (Id., subd. (c).) Plaintiff is ordered to pay reasonable sanctions of $2243 to defendants within 30 days. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
